title: adonis vernalis var. amurensis
intro: Adonis vernalis var. amurensis, also known as Korean mountain adonis, is a plant species native to the mountainous regions of Korea and Russia. It is a perennial plant with yellow flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to expel cold and relieve rheumatic pain. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help to reduce fever and alleviate pain, as well as promote healing and prevent infection. In traditional herbal preparations, Adonis vernalis var. amurensis is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
